Chronic Conditions Warehouse 
CODEBOOK: TAF Annual Managed Care Plan (APL) RIFs │ October 2022 │ V 1.1 21 

MC_PLAN_CNTRCT_START_DT 

LABEL: Managed Care Plan Contract Start Date 

DESCRIPTION: The start date of the managed care contract period with the state. 

SHORT NAME: MC_PLAN_CNTRCT_START_DT 

LONG NAME: MC_PLAN_CNTRCT_START_DT 

TYPE: DATE 

LENGTH: 8 

FILE(S): APL base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS Annual Managed Care Plan TAF 

VALUES: Date (numeric, system dependent) e.g., 31DEC2015 

COMMENT:
